verses.text: Tu-in Levi mite sung pan Levi' tapa Kohath, Kohath' tapa Izhar, Izhar' tapa Korah; leh Reuben mite sung pan Reuben' tapa Eliab, Eliab' tapa Dathan; leh Abiram; leh Peleth' tapa On
hih mite in pawl kai uh hi. Israel mite sung panin mi' theihkim, mihon sung panin a kiteel, mihonte a makai mi za nih leh sawmnga tawh Moses' mai-ah ding uh hi

Moses leh Aaron langpangin amaute kikaikhawmin amaute kiangah, “Khengval lua uh teh! Mihon khempeuhte a milipin siangtho uh a, amaute' lakah Topa om hi. Bang hangin Topa' mihonpite tungah nomau kiliansak tawm na hi uh hiam” a ci uh hi
Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin boksukin
Korah leh a pawlte khempeuh kiangah, “Zing ciangin Topa in a siangtho ahi mi, ama-a' ahi mi hong lakin, ama kiangah paisak ding a, amah in a teel ding mipa ama kiangah paisak ding hi
Hih bangin gamta un: Korah leh a pawlte khempeuh in paknamtui beel la un
Zing ciangin Topa' mai-ah tua beelte sungah mei koihin, mei tungah paknamtui koih un la, tua ciangin Topa' teel mi pen a siangtho hong hi ding hi. Levi' tapate aw, khengvallua uh teh!” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses in Korah kiangah, “No Levi mite aw, tu-in za un
Israel mite' Pasian in ama kiangah hong paipih ding, Topa' biakbuk sungah nasep sem ding, mihonte' na a sem dingin amau' mai-ah a ding dingin Israel mihonte' kiang panin hong khenkhiatna
leh nang leh na sanggamte ahi Levi' mite, ama kiangah hong paipihna hawmthawh lai na hi hiam? Siampi nasepna zong deih lai na hi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin nang leh na pawlte khempeuh hih lai-ah na kikaihkhopna uh pen Topa langpan'na ahi hi. Note in na phunsan uh Aaron pen bang mi hi mawk ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses in mi sawlin Eliab' tapa Dathan leh Abiram samsak hi. Amaute in, “Kong pai kei ding uh hi
Kote' tungah nangmah ulianin kibawl tawmin, gamlakah kote hong that dingin bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gam panin nong paikhiatpihna thu hawmthawh lai na hi hiam

Tua thamloin nangmah in bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gamah kote hong paipih loin, lote leh leenggui lote zong nong luahsak kei hi. Hih mite' mit khelkhia ding na hi hiam? Kong pai kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Moses heh mahmah ahih manin Topa' kiangah, “Amau' biakna thupi ngaihsut kei in. Amaute tungah bangmah ka gamta khial kei a, a la uh khat beek nangawn ka laksak kei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses in Korah kiangah, “Nang leh na pawlte, nang leh amaute, Aaron tawh zing ciangin Topa' mai-ah hong om un

Note in na milipun na paknamtui beel ciat uh la-in, a sungah paknamtui koih un la, Topa' mai-ah na paknamtui beel ciat uh, paknamtui beel za nih leh sawmnga paipih un. Aaron leh nangmah in zong na paknamtui beel tuak uh paipih un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin a milipun a paknamtui beel ciat uh la uh a, tuate sungah mei koihin a tungah paknamtui koih uh a, kikhopna buk kongah Moses leh Aaron tawh ding khawm uh hi
Tua ciangin Korah in amaute' langkhat, kikhopna bukkongah mihonte khempeuh khawm hi. Topa' minthan'na mihon khempeuhte tungah hong kilang hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
“Amaute tomno sungin ka beisak theihna dingin hih mihonte lak panin kihem un,” a ci hi
Amaute boksuk uh a, “Pasian, mi khempeuhte' tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian aw, mi khat' khialhna hangin mihon khempeuhte' tungah nang heh ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Mihonte tungah hih bangin gen in: Korah, Dathan, leh Abiram-te' omna kiim panin paikhia un, ci in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses dingin Dathan leh Abiram kiangah pai a, Israel upate in zong amah a zui uh hi

Amah in mihonte kiangah, “Amaute' khialhna khempeuh tawh note hong kiphiatkhia khading ahih manin, hih migilote' puanbuk panin paikhia un la, amau' na khat beek lawng kha kei un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Korah, Dathan, leh Abiram-te' omna kiim panin amaute a paikhia uh hi. Dathan leh Abiram-te, a zite uh leh a tapate uh leh a taneute uh tawh hong pusuakin a puanbuk kong uhah dingkhawm uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses in, “Hih na khempeuh a sem dingin Topa in kei hong sawl hi. Hih nasep pen keima utthu ahih lohna, hih thu tawh na thei ding uh hi
Mi khempeuh a sih ngei bang danin hih mite si a, tua ahih kei leh mi khempeuh in a tuah ngeite a tuah leh, Topa in kei hong sawlloh ahi hi

Ahih hangin Topa in a thak khat hong piangsakin, leitang in a kam ka-in amaute' neih khempeuh tawh hih mite valhtumin, a hingtangin Leinuai-ah a tumsuk uh leh, hih mite in Topa a simmawh ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Hih thute a gen khit phetin amau' nuai-ah lei kiphelkham hi
Leitang a kam ka-in, Korah tawh a kipawl mi khempeuh leh a innkuanpihte uh leh a neihsa khempeuh uh valhtum hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute leh a neihsa khempeuh uh a hingtangun Leinuai-ah tumsuk uh hi. Leitang in amaute khupnelhin mihonpite' lak panin amaute bei uh hi
Amaute' kikona hangin a kiim uha om Israel mite khempeuh tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Leitang in hong valhtum kha in teh!” ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' kiang panin mei hong paikhia a, paknamtui a pia mi za nih leh sawmngate kangtum hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah
“Siampi Aaron' tapa Eleazar in meikuang sung panin paknamtui beelte a lakkhiat ding gen in la, tua ciangin a gamlapi-ah mei thehthang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nate

amau' nuntakna a beina dongin a khial hih mite' paknamtui beelte a siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakna tau sitna kuangdai dingin seek un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa' mai-ah tuate pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua nate siangtho hi. Israel mite tungah tua bangin hih nate pen lim khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin siampi Eleazar in mei tawh a kangtum mite' piak paknamtui sumngo beelte la-in biakna tau sitna-in a sek hi

Topa in Moses tung tawnin Eleazar tungah a gen bangin Korah leh a pawlte tawh a kibang khalo dingin, siampi a hilo, Aaron' suanlekhakte a hilo mi peuhmah, Topa' mai-ah paknamtui hal dingin a pailohna ding, Israel mite tungah phawksakna khat ahi hi
Ahih hangin a zing ciangin Israel mihon khempeuh in Moses leh Aaron phunsan uh a, “ Topa' mite na that uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Moses leh Aaron langpangin mihonte a kikhop uh ciangin, kikhopna buk lamah amaute a khuadak uh ciangin, meii in na tuam a, Topa' minthan'na vang kilang hi
Kikhopna buk mailamah Moses leh Aaron pai a
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Tomno sungin amaute ka siatsak theihna dingin hih mihonte' lak panin paikhia un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute gel zong boksuk uh hi

Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Na paknamtui beel la-in, biakna tau pana mei a sungah koih in la, a tungah paknamtui koihin, mihonte' lakah paipih mengmeng in la, amaute-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' kiang panin hehna hong paikhia khin a, gimna kipan khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses' gen bangin Aaron in paknamtui beel la-in mihonte lakah a tai hi. Mite lakah gimna kipan khin takpi a, amah in paknamtui koihin mite-a' dingin kilemna a bawlsak hi
A si leh a hingte' kikalah amah ding a, gimna a veng hi
Tu-in Korah' tungtangah a site simloh, hih gimna tawh a si mi tul sawm leh tul li leh za sagih ahi hi
Gimna a ven' ciangin kikhopna bukkong Moses kiangah Aaron a ciahkik hi.
